title: alyssum montanum f. molliusculum
intro: Alyssum montanum f. molliusculum, also known as lesser alpine candytuft, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum montanum f. molliusculum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
